info.name: FAM Backend API
info.description: Family event management platform — three-role auth (user/admin/organizer), family tree, QR join, notifications.

item.name: Create a new organizer (also creates the associated event)
Get users for a specific event
Get all events with participant counts
Get details of a specific user in an event
Get details of a blocked user
Toggle tree visibility for an event
Get reports for a specific event
Verify OTP and receive JWT tokens
Exchange refresh token for a new access token
Join an event using event code
List events the authenticated user has joined
Get QR code image for an event
Get all notifications for the current user
Mark a single notification as read
Get the event assigned to this organizer
List participants of the assigned event
List users pending approval to join the event
Get current approval mode of the assigned event
Manually add a user to the event
Update approval mode for the assigned event
Approve a pending user to join the event
List family relationships awaiting organizer validation
Validate or reject a proposed relationship
Get the dynamic form field definitions for a QR join
Submit QR join form to request event access
Submit a report against a user or content
Review a report — mark as reviewed or dismissed (admin only)
Get reports for a specific event (admin or organizer)
Generate/get the family tree for an event

query.description: Filter by family side (wedding/anniversary events only)

item.name: Get tree snapshot history for an event
Find relationship path between two users
Propose a new family relationship (pending organizer validation)
Set the root/main person of the tree (admin/organizer only)
Set groom and bride for a wedding/anniversary tree (admin/organizer only)
Activate WorldTree subscription (payment stub — not yet integrated)
Get the current user's personal WorldTree
Add a person or relationship to personal WorldTree
